'''Ruby Gulch''' was a small settlement on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]] near [[Hweg Shul]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> populated by [[Newcomer]]s. It housed a pub called the [[Flowering Bott Pub]].
